products.name: Xsens MTi-680G
products.descriptor: Rugged IP68 RTK GNSS/INS with integrated RTK receiver

evidence.snippet:
![MTi-680G](https://www.xsens.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Mti%20680.jpg?width=1800&height=1200&name=Mti%20680.jpg)
MTi-680G
The MTi-680G is a high-performing GNSS/INS with an integrated RTK receiver.
[Read more](https://www.movella.com/products/sensor-modules/xsens-mti-680g-rtk-gnss-ins)

### Xsens MTi-680G
\- GNSS/INS + RTK rugged module, IP68 housing.
\- Integrated GNSS receiver for easy, plug & play implementation.
\- Time-synced orientation and positioning data.
[Learn More ->](https://www.xsens.com/sensor-modules/xsens-mti-680g-rtk-gnss-ins)

products.name: Xsens Avior AHRS & MRU
products.descriptor: OEM AHRS and MRU with 1° RMS heading accuracy and real-time heave output

evidence.snippet:
![Xsens Avior AHRS](https://www.xsens.com/hs-fs/hubfs/A-and-M-Avior/A%26M%20-%20Avior%20Workshop%20Background-Small.png?width=1200&height=798&name=A%26M%20-%20Avior%20Workshop%20Background-Small.png)
Xsens Avior AHRS & MRU
The Xsens Avior is a high-performing AHRS & MRU in an OEM form factor.
[Read more](https://www.movella.com/products/sensor-modules/xsens-avior-ahrs)

### Xsens Avior AHRS & MRU
​Unrivaled heading accuracy with drift-free roll, pitch, and true-north-referenced yaw, providing heading accuracy of 1° RMS. Real time heave output with a <5cm accuracy for 29 seconds.
[More about the Xsens Avior AHRS / MRU](/sensor-modules/xsens-avior-ahrs)

products.name: MTi 1-Series
products.descriptor: Ultra-compact 12×12 mm SMD inertial sensor module family (IMU/AHRS/GNSS/INS/RTK)

evidence.snippet:
### MTi 1-Series
\- Ultra-compact (12 × 12 mm), lightweight and low-power SMD module for space-constrained designs.
\- Delivers reliable orientation and positioning with onboard sensor fusion.
\- AHRS, INS/GNSS or INS/GNSS + RTK options, also available in easy to integrate modules for fast prototyping.
[Learn More ->](https://www.xsens.com/products/sensor-modules/xsens-mti-1-series)

products.name: MTi 600 OEM-Series
products.descriptor: OEM inertial sensor family from IMU to RTK GNSS/INS with up to 400 Hz output

evidence.snippet:
### MTi 600 OEM-Series
\- Up to 400 Hz orientation output providing high data rate.
\- OEM form factor, compact and easy to integrate in embedded systems.
\- AHRS, INS/GNSS or INS/GNSS + RTK options available. MTi-680 available with a Septentrio Development Kit with the Mosaic X5 - anti-jamming and anti-spoofing for critical GNSS applications.
[Learn More ->](https://www.xsens.com/products/sensor-modules/xsens-mti-600-series-flexible-reliable-imus-for-all-design-needs)
